trivia_bullets.text: Squad Captain is a reprint (Scryfall: reprint: true), originally printed in Core Set 2021 (M21, 2020). Its CMR inclusion as a common in the white soldier slot reflects the set's design goal of providing broadly useful creature types for Commander's go-wide tribal strategies — Soldiers are one of the most supported tribes in white across Commander history.

Flavor text: "The strength of the one is the strength of the many." The line is attributed to no named speaker — it reads as an aphorism of military doctrine rather than a character quote, functioning as the platoon's collective creed.

Squad Captain enters with a +1/+1 counter for each other creature you control, plus vigilance. In a wide board state this can be a 10/10+ for five mana. Despite the ceiling, the EDHREC rank of 19740 signals it rarely appears in tuned Commander lists — it is highly board-state-dependent and dead on an empty field. It sees more play in Pauper and PauperCommander go-wide white aggro.

Artist Cristi Balanescu's V-formation composition — the captain in front, identical armored soldiers fanning back in geometric array — is a deliberate visual argument for the card's oracle text: the captain's stat bloc literally derives from the soldiers behind her. The art and mechanic are in direct conversation.
